$comment: Mobile Video Player Media Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for the Video Player Media component — the video frame area with state-based overlays. Supports 4 property1 states: default (video thumbnail only), buffering (video + centered spinner control), replay (video + centered replay control), and Error (video + 50% black scrim + centered warning icon + error description pill). The Control component (node 928:2150) rendered inside buffering, replay, and Error states is a nested same-file component — its internal tokens are excluded here. Figma Reference: Node ID 928-1814

$component.name: Video Player Media
$component.description: The video frame component used inside the Video Player. Renders a 361×233px cropped video thumbnail with overflow-clip. Conditionally layers state overlays: a buffering spinner or replay button centered in the frame; or an error state with a full-frame dark scrim, a centered warning icon, and a bottom-center error description pill.
$component.structure: Fixed 361×233px container with overflow-clip. Background is the video poster image (object-cover). State overlays are absolutely positioned within this frame.

property1.default: Video poster only — no overlay controls
property1.buffering: Video poster + centered buffering spinner (Control, same file)
property1.replay: Video poster + centered replay button (Control, same file)
property1.Error: Video poster + full-frame 50% black scrim + centered warning icon (Control, same file) + bottom-center error description pill (Control, same file)

nested-components.Control: Node ID 928:2150 — Video Player Controls component from the same file. Rendered in buffering (Buffering icon), replay (replay icon), and Error (warning icon + time/error pill) states. Internal tokens are defined in video-player-controls.json and excluded here.

usage.contexts: Used as the media area inside the Video Player composite component
usage.features: 4 visual states (default, buffering, replay, error), full-frame error scrim, centered state control overlays

error.$comment: Error state overlays — scrim and repositioned nested controls (Control component, excluded)

background.description: Video player media error state full-frame scrim background - 50% opacity black - rgba(0,0,0,0.5). Covers the full 361×233px frame to dim the video poster.
